description: Cryptic note that may be in Judaeo-Arabic, with a formal-looking layout and מצריים at the bottom left (Cairo or Egypt). This may be a small fragment of a broader set of accounts or a small a receipt. The name Yehuda Bibas (יאודה ביבאש) appears, possibly with a quantity in raṭl units. Dating: Probably 19th century based on the paleography. ASE/MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
